narrator_text: There are no snow crabs visible anywhere in the Cobalt Fountains square — just the dye-works smell, the fountain basin, and Madam Pesca's needle-and-gear sign across the cobblestones.
options: Cross the square and knock on Madam Pesca's front door.
Pause at the fountain basin to splash cold water on your face — the wool coat is making you sweat badly.
Examine the fountain mechanism with Sudden Insight before approaching the shop.
